title: tf.reverse_sequence  |  TensorFlow v2.16.1
description:
Reverses variable length slices.
This op first slicesinputalong the dimensionbatch_axis, and for
each slicei, reverses the firstseq_lengths[i]elements along the
dimensionseq_axis.
The elements ofseq_lengthsmust obeyseq_lengths[i] <=
input.dims[seq_axis], andseq_lengthsmust be a vector of lengthinput.dims[batch_axis].
